questions.question: Does the school district have a policy for sustainability?
questions.answer: Yes, the school district has a sustainability policy. The Sustainability Committee, a sub-committee of the Board of Education, focuses on educating for a sustainable future by reducing the district's environmental impacts, promoting awareness of environmental and sustainability issues, and encouraging consideration of sustainability in decision-making.

questions.question: Does the school district have a sustainability committee?
questions.answer: Yes, the school district has a Sustainability Committee. It is a sub-committee of the Board of Education.

questions.question: Does the school district have a comprehensive plan for sustainability?
questions.answer: Yes, it has a three year sustainability vision & plan for 2024-27
